findings.title: Previous silent-idle alarms were false positives — both jobs have valid schedules

findings.title: Blocked-channel-recovery timeout risk at repeat=81 (escalation critical)
findings.mechanism: Last run took 890s against 600s timeout (ratio 1.484). Now at repeat=81 consecutive observations of timeout risk.
findings.root_cause: Blocked-channel-recovery script consistently runs near/over its timeout boundary.
findings.recommended_fix: Investigate why blocked-channel-recovery is taking 890s. Either increase timeout or optimize the script.

findings.title: Loop pypi-auto-unblocker has NO self-improvement mandate (persistent)
findings.mechanism: Script has no self-improvement mandate. When outcomes are flat, this loop will repeat the same tactics forever.
findings.root_cause: Loop was created without a self-improvement mandate or third-party verification requirement.
findings.recommended_fix: Add self_improvement_mandate section to detect flat outcomes, trigger redesign passes, and require independent signoff.

findings.title: Loop internal-linking-watchdog has NO self-improvement mandate (persistent)
findings.root_cause: Loop was created without a self-improvement mandate.
findings.recommended_fix: Add self_improvement_mandate. Schedule is confirmed valid (weekly Wed 3am); prior silent-idle finding was a false positive.
